$schema-note: Per-repo verifier config for the pi subagents engine (harness/pi/subagents). The Verifier may run ONLY the named checks defined here plus the always-available git checks (git-diff, git-diff-stat, git-status, git-log). Each check maps to a FIXED argv vector run with shell:false (no shell, no chaining). Replace the example checks below with your project's real commands. See harness/examples/checks.python-lmcache.json for a complete Python example.

args: replace with your test command, e.g. pytest -q
replace with your lint command, e.g. ruff check .
